question: Find the cities that have more than one employee under age 30.
gold_sql: SELECT city FROM employee WHERE age  <  30 GROUP BY city HAVING count(*)  >  1
gold_sql_original: SELECT city FROM employee WHERE age  <  30 GROUP BY city HAVING count(*)  >  1
gold_sql_canonical: SELECT city FROM employee WHERE age  <  30 GROUP BY city HAVING count(*)  >  1
agent_sql: SELECT City AS city, COUNT(*) AS employee_count FROM employee WHERE Age < 30 GROUP BY City LIMIT 100
safe_sql: SELECT City AS city, COUNT(*) AS employee_count FROM employee WHERE Age < 30 GROUP BY City LIMIT 100
agent_answer: The cities that have more than one employee under age 30 are: Bath (2 employees). All other cities in the result — Bristol, Wasps, and Sale — each have only one employee under age 30.
reason: Result mismatch: Row count mismatch: gold=1, agent=4
